languages.original_text: "An excellent observation! My technical designation is Manipulus." {n}His mechadendrites spring to life, pointing at his augmented abdomen.{/n} "And here is the galvanic cell, the repository of the Motive Force. It — no, that will take too long, better to give a demonstration. Observe!"

languages.text: "Прекрасное наблюдение! Моя техническая дезигнация — манипулус". {n}Его {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}мехадендриты{/g} оживают, указывая на аугментированный живот.{/n} "А здесь находится гальваническая батарея, вместилище Движущей Силы, она... Нет, долго, не наглядно. Демонстрирую!"

traits.locale_text: "Прекрасное наблюдение! Нет, долго, не наглядно. Демонстрирую!"

languages.text: 「素晴らしい観察眼ですね！私の技術的な名称は『マニピュラス』です。」{n}{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}機械的触手{/g}は動き出し、強化された腹部を指さします。{/n}「そしてここが、動力源の貯蔵庫である電気化学電池です。説明するとなると長くなるので、実演しましょう。ご覧あれ！」
languages.original_text: "An excellent observation! My technical designation is Manipulus." {n}His {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} spring to life, pointing at his augmented abdomen.{/n} "And here is the galvanic cell, the repository of the Motive Force. It — no, that will take too long, better to give a demonstration. Observe!"

traits.locale_text: 「素晴らしい観察眼ですね！私の技術的な名称は『マニピュラス』です。」{n}{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}機械的触手{/g}は動き出し、強化された腹部を指さします。{/n}「そしてここが、動力源の貯蔵庫である電気化学電池です。説明するとなると長くなるので、実演しましょう。ご覧あれ！」

languages.text: "Eine exzellente Beobachtung! Meine technische Kennung ist Manipulus." {n}Seine {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendriten{/g} erwachen zum Leben und zeigen auf seinen augmentierten Oberkörper.{/n} "Und hier ist die galvanische Zelle, das Repositorium der Antriebskraft. Sie ... nein, das würde zu lange dauern. Ich werde es einfach demonstrieren. Seht her!"
languages.original_text: "An excellent observation! My technical designation is Manipulus." {n}His {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} spring to life, pointing at his augmented abdomen.{/n} "And here is the galvanic cell, the repository of the Motive Force. It — no, that will take too long, better to give a demonstration. Observe!"

traits.locale_text: "Eine exzellente Beobachtung! Meine technische Kennung ist Manipulus." {n}Seine {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendriten{/g} erwachen zum Leben und zeigen auf seinen augmentierten Oberkörper.{/n} "Und hier ist die galvanische Zelle, das Repositorium der Antriebskraft. Sie ... nein, das würde zu lange dauern. Ich werde es einfach demonstrieren. Seht her!"

languages.text: «¡Una observación excelente! Mi designación técnica es manipulus». {n}Sus {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mecadendritas{/g} cobran vida y señalan a su abdomen mecanizado.{/n} «Y aquí reside mi célula galvánica, el repositorio de la Fuerza Motriz. Sirve para... no, tardaría mucho en explicarlo; es mejor hacer una demostración. ¡Observe!».
languages.original_text: "An excellent observation! My technical designation is Manipulus." {n}His {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} spring to life, pointing at his augmented abdomen.{/n} "And here is the galvanic cell, the repository of the Motive Force. It — no, that will take too long, better to give a demonstration. Observe!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Una observación excelente! Mi designación técnica es manipulus». {n}Sus {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mecadendritas{/g} cobran vida y señalan a su abdomen mecanizado.{/n} «Y aquí reside mi célula galvánica, el repositorio de la Fuerza Motriz. Sirve para... no, tardaría mucho en explicarlo; es mejor hacer una demostración. ¡Observe!».

languages.text: "Mükemmel bir gözlem! Teknik ünvanım Manipulus'tur." {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mekadentritleri{/g} canlanarak ogmentli karnını işaret ediyor.{/n} "Bu da Devinim Gücü'nün depolandığı galvaniz hücrem. Bu şekilde çok uzayacak gerçi, en iyisi göstermek. İzleyin!"
languages.original_text: "An excellent observation! My technical designation is Manipulus." {n}His {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} spring to life, pointing at his augmented abdomen.{/n} "And here is the galvanic cell, the repository of the Motive Force. It — no, that will take too long, better to give a demonstration. Observe!"

languages.text: « Excellente observation ! Mon titre technique est manipulus. » {n}Ses {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mécadendrites{/g} s'animent soudainement pour pointer en direction de son abdomen augmenté.{/n} « Et voici la cellule galvanique, réceptacle de la Force Motrice. Elle... Non, ce serait trop long à expliquer. Mieux vaut vous faire une démonstration. Regardez ! »
languages.original_text: "An excellent observation! My technical designation is Manipulus." {n}His {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} spring to life, pointing at his augmented abdomen.{/n} "And here is the galvanic cell, the repository of the Motive Force. It — no, that will take too long, better to give a demonstration. Observe!"

languages.text: “真是好眼力！我的技术称号是操纵者。”{n}他的{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}机械触须{/g}骤然激活，指向加装了植入物的腹部。{/n}“此处便是原电池，它储藏着源力。它——不，解释起来太耗时，最好直接演示。请看！”

It — no, that will take too long, better to give a demonstration. Observe!"
